texto: This is our sacred land, Bharat, a land whose glories are sung by theGods, a land visualized by Mahayogi Aurobindo as the living manifestationof the Divine Mother of the universe, the Jaganmaataa, the Aadishakti,the Mahaamaayaa, the Mahaadurgaa, Who has assumed concrete form toenable us to see Her and worship Her,...a land worshipped by all our seers andsages as Maatrubhoomi, Dharmabhoomi, Karmabhoomi and Punybhoomi, averitable Devabhoomi and Mokshabhoomi" -
explicacao: Citação de Madhav Sadashiv Golwalkar sobre temas ligados a fe. “This is our sacred land, Bharat, a land whose glories are sung by theGods, a land visualized by M…” articula fe, freedom, patriotic em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como patriotic e patriotism.

texto: All the time, circumstances are not going to favor us. We shall have toface obstacles and adversities. Fearlessness is the first virtue of a hero, thestarting point of all other noble virtues.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Madhav Sadashiv Golwalkar sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “All the time, circumstances are not going to favor us. We shall have toface obstacles and adversi…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a coragem, brave, fearless, útil em momentos de fearless.
